LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RANDY MCBRIDE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAS DEMONSTRATED THAT HE IS A GOOD FAITH PURCHASER PURSUANT TO BUSINESS & PROFESSIONS CODE 21711 AND NOT LIABLE. FURTHER, DEFENDANT HAS MET HIS BURDEN OF SHOWING FOR EACH CAUSE OF ACTION THAT ONE OR MORE ELEMENTS OF THE CAUSE OF ACTION CANNOT BE ESTABLISHED, AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HIS BURDEN OF MAKING A PRIMA FACIE SHOWING WITH ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE OF THE EXISTENCE OF A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN HE DID NOT ENTER INTO A CONTRACT WITH PLAINTIFF, THAT HE DID NOT MAKE ANY REPRESENTATIONS TO PLAINTIFF, THAT HE DID NOT CALL THE POLICE, THAT HE DOES NOT KNOW DEFENDANTS LIEBOWITZ, GARDNER, OR ANY EMPLOYEES OR AGENTS OF SELF-STORAGE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G) AND APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND CAN SUBMIT BY WAY OF E-MAIL) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Off Calendar Mar-18-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-21-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ROBERT A. WASHINGTON, TEL. NO. 309-2736, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. JAIME G. TOUCHSTONE, TEL. NO. 399-3906 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RANDY MCBRIDE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED because Defendant has demonstrated that he is a good faith purchaser pursuant to Business & Professions Code 21711 and not liable. Further, Defendant has met his burden of showing for each cause of action that one or more elements of the cause of action cannot be established, and Plaintiff has not met his burden of making a prima facie showing with admissible evidence of the existence of a triable issue of material fact. Defendant has shown he did not enter into a contract with Plaintiff, that he did not make any representations to Plaintiff, that he did not call the police, that he does not know Defendants Liebowitz, Gardner, or any employees or agents of Self-Storage. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G) and approval as to form and can submit by way of e-mail) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Continued To Mar-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jaime G. Touchstone, Esq. of Futterman Dupree Dodd Croley Maier LLP, Tel. 415.399.3906, for defendant and moving party;
Robert A. Washington, plaintiff and opposing party appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of arguments, and pursuant to plaintiff's request, the court vacated its tentative ruling and continued DEFENDANT RANDY MCBRIDE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION to March 6, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give plaintiff the opportunity to conduct discovery. Supplemental opposition may be filed by 2/20/13; reply may be filed by 2/27/13. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
